reviews.comment:
El guardia y encargado no dejaron entrar a nena menor acompañada al baño por no ser socio del aca. El ACA es nefasto ya q ellos son los que bajan la orden supuestamente

(Translated by Google)
The security guard and manager wouldn't let a young girl accompanied by an adult into the bathroom because she wasn't a member of the ACA. The ACA is terrible since they're supposedly the ones who give the orders.

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicios de gnc y naftas , lugar donde cargó yo . Un poco lejos los baños,  de la zona de gnc . Totalmente remodelada , quedó hermosa y los baños de excelent3s condiciones .

(Translated by Google)
CNG and gasoline service station, where I filled up. The restrooms are a bit far from the CNG area. Completely remodeled, it looks beautiful, and the restrooms are in excellent condition.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen surtidor de combustibles precios muy económicos en gnc y estacionamientos, baños impecables edificio que se terminó de reconstruir hace varios meses.servicio de primera, aire en neumáticos lavado de parabrisas, puntos en serviclub x su consumo, negocio de ventas para aceites o refrigerantes.ACA en el lugar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent fuel station with very economical prices on CNG and parking, spotless restrooms, and a building that was recently renovated. First-rate service, tire inflation, windshield washing, points at Serviclub for your purchases, and a shop selling oils and coolants. ACA is also located on-site.
